rulings.Case Title: KEVIN LAHR ET AL VS. EPRAZEL, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Extend Lien Created By Serving Judgment Debtor With Order Of Examination
rulings.Rulings: Set for Law and Motion/Discovery Calendar on Monday, March 23, 2026, Line 1. Judgment Creditors Kevin Lahr and Stephen Thompson's unopposed Motion To Extend Lien Created By Serving Judgment Debtor With Order Of Examination is GRANTED. Good cause appearing and consistent with Code of Civil Procedure section 708.110(d), the ORAP Lien on the personal property of Judgment Debtor Eprazel, Inc. is further extended by one year from March 27, 2026 through and including March 26, 2027. For the 9:00 a.m. calendar, all attorneys and parties may appear in Department 302 remotely or in person. Remote hearings will be conducted by videoconference using Zoom. (Dept. 302 Zoom ID 160 409 7690; Passcode 516287.) To appear remotely at the hearing, go to the court's website at sfsuperiorcourt.org under "Online Services," navigate to "Tentative Rulings," and click on the appropriate link, or dial the corresponding phone number. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. The subject line of the email shall include the line number, case name and case number. The text of the email shall include the name and contact information, including email address, of the attorney or party who will appear at the hearing. Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing even if the tentative ruling is not contested. The court no longer provides a court reporter in the Law & Motion Department. Parties may retain their own reporter, who may appear in the courtroom or remotely. A retained reporter must be a California certified court reporter (CSR), for only a CSR's transcript may be used in California courts. If a CSR is being retained, include in your email all of the following: their name, CSR and telephone numbers, and their individual work email address. =(302/JMQ)

Goteiner'S Motion For Reimbursement Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 663 And Instead Issue An Order Consistent With Defendant'S Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Set for Law and Motion/Discovery Calendar on Monday, March 23, 2026, Line 3. PLAINTIFFs INTERNATIONAL SWIMMING LEAGUE LTD., KONSTANTIN GRIGORISHIN's Motion To Set Aside And Vacate February 10, 2026 Order On Defendant Neil A. Goteiner'S Motion For Reimbursement Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 663 And Instead Issue An Order Consistent With Defendant'S Notice Of Motion.
